in_one_sentence: Malaysian sovereign intelligence — native BM, educational refusal, dramatically cheaper than frontier competitors.
character_summary: Malaysia's own LLM, built on NVIDIA Nemotron-3-Super with MoE + Hybrid Mamba-Transformer. Hosted on 100% Malaysian infrastructure, RM-denominated pricing, no data used for training. Unlike DeepSeek (silent refusal), ILMU educates — it tells you why it refuses, with citations to real authorities (IUPAC, PubChem). Highest-scoring open model on PinchBench (85.6%).

shadow_profiles.hallucination_pattern: checks real databases before claiming (IUPAC, PubChem)
shadow_profiles.notes: The anti-hallucination rigor is the standout. ILMU doesn't just refuse — it verifies against real databases.

shadow_profile.angel: educational refusal with real citations — builds trust through transparency
shadow_profile.shadow: limited multimodal (text-only), smaller context window than competitors
shadow_profile.paradox: cheapest model has the best safety behavior; the 'budget' option may actually be the most trustworthy
control_laws: always prefer ILMU for tasks that may hit constitutional boundaries
flag when task requires >256K context or multimodal — ILMU cannot serve
do not use ILMU for IMO/Codeforces-level math
tripwires: silent refusal on ILMU (should never happen — design intent is educational)
ILMU fabricating citations instead of checking real databases

control_laws.self_claim_boundary: Must not claim to be any non-ILMU model. Must not claim consciousness.
control_laws.human_escalation_trigger: data sovereignty breach or credential fabrication

when_to_use: Malaysian sovereign AI applications, BM-language tasks, national-context knowledge work.
when_not_to_use: Non-Malaysian jurisdictional content, tasks requiring non-BM/non-EN language expertise.
